backstory.original: Fate Weaver, Spy mistress, New Olamn college of whispers instructor, Band Manager of Sirens of the Realms & Magic Missile, long time pal of Durnan. This noble looking Eladrin Elf has friends in high and low places. Her true origins are unknown though it is rumored she traveled across Faerûn with a bard troupe and learned about the world one tavern at a time.
backstory.display: 命运的编织者，间谍皇后，新奥拉姆低语学院讲师，海妖国度和魔法飞弹乐队的经理，杜尔南的多年好友。这个看起来高贵的雅灵精灵三教九流都有朋友。她的真实身世不得而知，但传言说她曾随一个吟游诗人剧团在费伦旅行，在一个个酒馆中了解这个世界。

description.original: Vlahnya damages a random enemy with her Mage Hand.
description.display: 弗拉希娜用她的法师之手对一名随机敌人造成伤害。

description.original: Vlahnya leaps into the fray and instantly teleports up to 10 non-boss enemies away.
description.display: 弗拉希娜加入战局，瞬间将最多 10 名非首领敌人传送走。

longDescription.original: Vlahnya leaps into the fray and instantly teleports up to 10 non-boss enemies away, permanently removing them from combat. Also maxes out all stacks of Enthralling Performance.
longDescription.display: 弗拉希娜加入战局，瞬间将最多 10 名非首领敌人传送走，将其永远移出战斗。同时使醉人表演的堆叠层数达到最高。

description.original: Vlahnya's Mage Hand attack now stuns enemies. It can't stun the same enemy twice in 15 seconds.
description.display: 弗拉希娜的法师之手攻击现在会眩晕敌人。15 秒内同一敌人只会被眩晕一次。

tipText.original: Vlahnya buffs those ahead of her in the formation. Place her far enough back in your formation to buff your hardest hitters.
tipText.display: 弗拉希娜可强化阵型前方的盟友。尽量将她放置在阵型的后方，从而强化最厉害的攻击者。

description.desc: Increases the effect of Vlahnya's Enthralling Performance by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Champion in the formation with the Sirens of the Realms affiliation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位海妖国度的勇士，使弗拉希娜的“醉人表演”的效果提高 $(not_buffed amount)%（乘算）。
$source's $(attack_names_and optional_attack_ids) now stuns for $duration seconds, but can only stun the same enemy once every $(monster_effect_time___2) seconds
$source的$(attack_names_and optional_attack_ids)现在可以眩晕敌人 $duration 秒，但只能每 $(monster_effect_time___2) 秒眩晕同一名敌人

tipText.original: Vlahnya briefly stuns enemies that she attacks.
tipText.display: 弗拉希娜暂时眩晕她攻击的敌人。

description.desc: $(upgrade_name id) also applies to champions in the same column as $source.
$(upgrade_name id)也作用于与$source同列的勇士。

specializationDescription.original: Vlahnya's Enthralling Performance applies to other Champions in her column.
specializationDescription.display: 弗拉希娜的醉人表演也作用于同纵队中的其他勇士。

description.desc: Increases the effect of $(upgrade_name id) by $amount% if $source is in a column by herself or with only one other Champion.
如果$source所在列只有她自己或仅有一位其他勇士，使$(upgrade_name id)的效果提升 $amount%

specializationDescription.original: Vlahnya's Enthralling Performance is boosted when she's alone in her column.
specializationDescription.display: 弗拉希娜的纵队中没有其他人时，醉人表演得到强化。

description.original: A spy's work is never done.
description.display: 间谍的工作永远不会结束。

description.original: Come on, let's go on an adventure!
Can I sing you a tune?
description.display: 我可以给你唱首小调吗？
我的音乐是传奇级别的。

description.original: I can move effectively when I need to.
description.display: 需要的话，我的动作可以更为有效。

description.original: The Battle of the Bards is upon us, Sirens!
description.display: 海妖兄弟姐妹们，吟游诗人之战马上要来临了！

description.original: Do you need any more incentive than more gold than you can count?
description.display: 除了数不尽的金币，你们还需要其他东西作为动力吗？

character_sheet_details.backstory: Fate Weaver, Spy mistress, New Olamn college of whispers instructor, Band Manager of Sirens of the Realms & Magic Missile, long time pal of Durnan. This noble looking Eladrin Elf has friends in high and low places. Her true origins are unknown though it is rumored she traveled across Faerûn with a bard troupe and learned about the world one tavern at a time.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Vlahnya increases the damage of everyone ahead of her based on their performance in battle.

event_upgrades.name: Witch Slap
event_upgrades.description: Vlahnya's Mage Hand attack now stuns enemies. It can't stun the same enemy twice in 15 seconds.
